creator: lihong@ieee.org
text:
On Mon, 2010-08-02 at 14:40 +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of chinese/ibus-chewing,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/149196 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/149196
> 

approved.
Thanks for your contributions!

Best regards, Eric
